query:
-- Check what billingPlatform values exist and which platforms these customers use
SELECT 
  bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.contactName,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(bi.billingPlatform, ''), 'ChannelHaus/ECN') as platform,
  COUNT(*) as itemCount,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as totalRevenue,
  MIN(bi.invoiceNumber) as sampleInvoice
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
GROUP BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId;

-- Check what billingPlatform values exist and which platforms these customers use
SELECT 
  bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.contactName,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(bi.billingPlatform, ''), 'ChannelHaus/ECN') as platform,
  COUNT(*) as itemCount,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as totalRevenue,
  MIN(bi.invoiceNumber) as sampleInvoice
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
GROUP BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId;
